toyota_arene.roadmap: Decouple software from hardware, modular components, rollout to other vehicles in redesign cycles

vw_cariad.status: Restructured to partnership-led approach (Rivian, Xpeng, Bosch)

regional_strategy.china: CEA (China Electronic Architecture) with Xpeng for 2026; CEA 2.0 in 2027
regional_strategy.global: Zonal SDV architecture with Rivian and Qualcomm Snapdragon, 2027 launch (ID. EVERY1)

vw_cariad.roadmap: Gatekeeper for third-party software, focusing on automated driving and infotainment

l3_deployment.status: Early commercial phase, mass production beginning
l3_deployment.timeline: 2027-2028 widespread personal vehicle integration (Ford UEV 2028, Porsche, Audi)
l3_deployment.china_market: Aggressive mass production by Li Auto, XPeng starting 2025-2026

l4_robotaxis.status: Scaling phase, transitioning from tech validation to profitability
l4_robotaxis.timeline: Broad geographic expansion in 2026, large-scale commercialization by 2030
l4_robotaxis.key_players: Waymo (targeting 20 cities by end of 2026), XPeng (L4 mass production H2 2026)

trends: Shift to Solid-State and FMCW (Frequency-Modulated Continuous Wave)
Integration into ADAS (L2+/L3) for redundancy and safety
Cost reduction and democratization to mid-range vehicles
Fully integrated e-drive modules (motor, inverter, transmission)
Shared cooling systems and minimized mechanical losses
Stacked power cards for vertical space saving

sic_adoption.status: Dominant for traction inverters in premium/high-performance BEVs
sic_adoption.benefits: Handles high voltages (800V architectures) and temperatures, 70% lower power losses than Si

gan_adoption.status: Primarily used in onboard chargers (OBCs) and DC-DC converters
gan_adoption.benefits: Superior high-frequency switching capabilities, ultra-fast switching, smaller size

si_igbt.status: Still holds ~55% market share for entry-level BEVs and PHEVs due to cost advantages

gigacasting_megacasting.status: Accelerated adoption to reduce EV weight, consolidate parts, and lower production costs
gigacasting_megacasting.asian_oems: Fastest adopters (BYD, Geely/Zeekr, Li Auto, NIO, XPeng, Chery/Huawei) using it for front/rear modules and battery housings

legacy_oems.ford: Unboxed assembly method for new EV platform
legacy_oems.volvo: Investing in megacast rear floors for next-gen EVs
legacy_oems.vw: Developing megacasting techniques for Trinity EV platform

challenges: Plant reconfiguration and high CAPEX (6,000-9,000+ ton presses)
